lenient.rationale_for_score: The summary is fluent and coherent but suffers from a significant consistency issue: it repeats the same sentence twice with slight variations (once as a full sentence, once as a fragment), which degrades quality. Additionally, while the text is grounded in the article, it omits the crucial outcome of the story (the ban and annulled results) to focus solely on the initial misconduct, making it less relevant as a complete summary.

strict.rationale_for_score: The summary is fluent and coherent but suffers from a critical relevance flaw: it only covers the first paragraph of the source text (the incident description) while completely omitting the significant consequences detailed in the rest of the article (job loss, annulment of results, ban duration, and admission of guilt). Additionally, while the summary states he 'asked pupils to make changes,' the source text clarifies this was his insistence/interpretation ('insisted... he did not ask... but to make them more legible'), making the summary slightly less consistent with the full nuance of the article's findings.

strict.adjustment_notes: No changes made.
